ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar May-09-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Clara Frendian (Petitioner). Anita Vejar was also present.

The issues raised in the Examiner's notes have been addressed. The Court advised Mrs. Frendian the steps that are required to administer the estate and also advised her to seek legal help. The Court granted the petition (order signed in open court). Status Hearing for compliance is set on May 9, 2012 at 9:00 am, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos.
